---
title: "Contact Details"
---

::: {.page-title}
I am open to internships, graduate roles, business analyst, data analyst, finance-related analytical roles, research collaborations, and conversations about analytics, machine learning, and business strategy.
:::

::: {.contact-wrap}
<div class="contact-methods">
<div class="contact-row">
<span class="contact-label">Location</span>
<span>Dublin, Ireland</span>
</div>

<a class="contact-row" href="tel:+353871199595">
<span class="contact-label">Phone</span>
<span>+353 87 119 9595</span>
</a>

<a class="contact-row contact-email" href="mailto:saahil.bhatt30@gmail.com">
<span class="contact-label">Email</span>
<span>saahil.bhatt30@gmail.com</span>
</a>

<div class="social-icon-row" aria-label="Social profile links">
<a class="social-icon-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/sahil-bhattacharya-257924228" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="LinkedIn profile">
<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
<span>LinkedIn</span>
</a>

<a class="social-icon-link" href="https://github.com/Saahil0206" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="GitHub profile">
<i class="bi bi-github"></i>
<span>GitHub</span>
</a>
</div>
</div>
:::
